api_scope.notes: Order APIs selected from the current official ECS-section online documentation. This scope does not claim every Order API published under other documentation boundaries.

parameters.name: onDemand
parameters.description: 是否按需资源，true 按需 / false 包周期

descriptions.en-GB: Whether to price a pay-as-you-go resource
descriptions.en-US: Whether to price a pay-as-you-go resource

parameters.name: cycleType
parameters.description: 订购周期类型，当onDemand为false时为必填

descriptions.en-GB: Billing cycle type for a subscription order
descriptions.en-US: Billing cycle type for a subscription order
descriptions.zh-CN: 包周期订单的订购周期类型

parameters.name: cycleCount
parameters.description: 订购周期大小，当onDemand为false时为必填

descriptions.en-GB: Number of billing cycles for a subscription order
descriptions.en-US: Number of billing cycles for a subscription order
descriptions.zh-CN: 包周期订单的订购周期数

parameters.name: flavorName
parameters.description: 云主机规格，当resourceType为VM时必填

parameters.name: imageUUID
parameters.description: 云主机镜像UUID，当resourceType为VM时必填

parameters.name: sysDiskType
parameters.description: 云主机系统盘类型，当resourceType为VM时必填

parameters.name: sysDiskSize
parameters.description: 云主机系统盘大小，当resourceType为VM时必填

descriptions.en-GB: ECS system disk size in GiB
descriptions.en-US: ECS system disk size in GiB

parameters.name: ipPoolBandwidth
parameters.description: 共享带宽大小，当resourceType为IP_POOL时必填

parameters.name: deviceType
parameters.description: 物理机规格，当resourceType为BMS时必填

parameters.name: azName
parameters.description: 物理机规格可用区，当resourceType为BMS时必填

parameters.name: elbType
parameters.description: 性能保障型负载均衡类型，当resourceType为PGELB时必填

descriptions.zh-CN: 性能保障型负载均衡类型

parameters.name: cbrValue
parameters.description: 存储库大小，当resourceType为CBR_VM或CBR_VBS时必填

description.en-GB: Calculate a renewal price by resource UUID
description.en-US: Calculate a renewal price by resource UUID
description.zh-CN: 按资源 UUID 查询续订价格

description.en-GB: Calculate an upgrade price by resource UUID
description.en-US: Calculate an upgrade price by resource UUID
description.zh-CN: 按资源 UUID 查询升级价格
